biography: Ricke has contributed to the competitive tapestry of the Hector Trophée through his dedicated participation in two distinct editions of this esteemed pair competition. His appearances, while not numerous, form a chapter in the tournament's history.

Across his two prior entries, Ricke engaged with the demanding formats of both individual and pair play. Despite his earnest efforts on the course, he did not secure the coveted Hector Trophée with a partner, nor did he claim the prestigious Victor Trophy as the individual champion. Nevertheless, his commitment added to the competitive spirit of the events in which he featured.

As the Hector Trophée 2026 prepares to commence, Ricke is noted as having concluded his active involvement within the tournament series. His concise but definite journey ensures his place among those who have contributed to the evolving heritage of the Hector Trophée.
